Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Inventory And Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Continued To Aug-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evelyn Jew for Edward Jew; Gloria Cheng (Administrator); Christina Cheng (daughter of Gloria Cheng)

Ms. Jew advised the Court that her father, Edward Jew, passed away in March of 2015, and that his files had been passed along to Connie Yee. She stated that it was her understanding that all the assets of the estate had been distributed, and that there was nothing left in it. The Court stated that there needed to be a final accounting. Christina Cheng stated that she had spoken with Connie Yee, and that she could help with any final submission to the Court. The Court responded that the Administrator should proceed with getting the final accounting before the Court, and that she should get counsel to assist her to do so. The Status Hearing re Inventory and Petition for Final Distribution was continued to August 4, 2015 at 9:00 a.m./1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. The Hearing re Order to Appear was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Inventory And Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Continued To Jun-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Gloria Cam Cheng and the Attorney Edward Jew to appear on June 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Continued To Apr-06-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Van Way on behalf of the Law Office of Edward Jew for and with Gloria Cam Cheng. Kristen Caverly appeared by telephone for Petitioner. Christine Cheng also present.

The Court stated that a civil action had been filed by Ms. Kaverly's Client and that she would be suing herself. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Shirley Koutney or Gloria Cheng being appointed, and conflict of interest. Mr. Way stated that he would like to have the opportunity to have his Client appointed. The Court stated that it was inappropriate to appoint Shirley Koutney. The matter was continued to April 6, 2010 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a competing petition is filed, this matter will be put over to the assigned hearing date on that petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
